code: import React from'react';import{useDispatch}from'react-redux';import{removeFromCart,updateQuantity}from'../store/CartSlice';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CartItem(_ref){let{item}=_ref;const dispatch=useDispatch();const handleQuantityChange=e=>{const newQuantity=parseInt(e.target.value);if(newQuantity>0){dispatch(updateQuantity({id:item.id,quantity:newQuantity}));}};const handleRemove=()=>{dispatch(removeFromCart(item.id));};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"cart-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"item-details",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{children:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"item-price",children:["$",item.price]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"item-controls",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Qty: "}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("select",{value:item.quantity,onChange:handleQuantityChange,children:[1,2,3,4,5].map(num=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:num,children:num},num))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"item-subtotal",children:["Subtotal: $",(item.price*item.quantity).toFixed(2)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"remove-btn",onClick:handleRemove,children:"Remove"})]})]});}export default CartItem;
